logistics.format: Multiple-choice (one best answer), online with virtual proctoring (Kryterion / Webassessor)

recommended_certs.rationale: ベンダ非依存の CIDPRO に対し、Microsoft Entra 寄りの SC-300 を併用して実装側を補完するパターン。
SailPoint の実装系資格と CIDPRO のベンダ中立な体系を組み合わせる IAM エンジニアが多い。

plus.note: IDPro Body of Knowledge is the only community-driven, vendor-neutral IAM curriculum.

minus.note: CIDPRO launched 2022; market awareness still building vs vendor IAM creds.
No CPE/renewal currently required, which limits long-term currency signal.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
